commit_message: Correctly assign `almost_full` flag in `hwpe_stream_fifo` Correctly assign `almost_full` flag in `hwpe_stream_fifo` The `almost_full` flag of the `hwpe_stream_fifo` module was erroneously determined with the same logic used to calculate the `almost_empty` flag. This PR fixes the issue.
